metadata.name: Vidhin's Regexes
metadata.description:
Sorting streams using [TRaSH Guides](https://trash-guides.info) regex + Ranked Stream Expressions. Choose **English**, **German**, or **Legacy English**. Fully **auto-syncs** updates to regex patterns and expressions.

 * **English** — Full scoring: quality tiers, audio hierarchy, HDR/DV, streaming tags, anime, editions, penalties.
 * **German** — Same as English plus TRaSH DE and DE Anime quality profiles: DE DL / DE-only / Not DE/EN, DE T1–T3 (Remux/Bluray/Web), Web Scene DE, DE Anime BD/Web tiers, LQ DE, DE Microsized.
 * **Legacy English** — Release-group scoring only (no detailed audio/visual/streaming). **Not recommended**; use English unless you only care about release groups.

 * **ⓘ Requires Stream Expression Score in sort order** (not Regex)
 * Use `{stream.seScore}` and `{stream.rseMatched}` instead of `{stream.regexMatched}` in custom formatters
 * ⚠️ [How to customize scores](https://github.com/dvoin3scu/Releases-Regex#customizing-scores)
metadata.author: dvoin3scu

inputs.name: Variant
inputs.description:
Choose English (full scoring), German (+ DE + DE Anime quality profiles), or Legacy English (mostly release groups based). 

 * **English** — Full scoring: **Quality & source** (Remux, Bluray, Web tiers; repack/proper; season packs). **Anime** (BD/Remux/Web, SeaDex Best/Alt, uncensored bonus, penalties). **Audio** (full hierarchy). **Visual** (HDR, Dolby Vision, HDR10/10+). **Movie** (editions, boutique labels). **Streaming** (source tags, UHD/HD boosts). **Penalties** (low-quality, undesired tags). Best for most users.
 * **German** — Same as English plus TRaSH DE and DE Anime quality profiles: **DE** (DE DL, DE-only, Not DE/EN); **DE T1–T3** (Remux/Bluray/Web); Web Scene DE; **DE Anime** (BD/Web tiers, Scene, Subbed); LQ DE, DE Microsized.
 * **Legacy English** — **Mostly Release Groups based** (no audio/visual/streaming tiers, no anime/edition detail). **Not recommended** unless you only care about group preference.

options.label: Legacy English (Mostly Release Groups based — not recommended)

inputs.name: Clear preferred regex patterns
inputs.description: Preferred regex are not used by this template. **Keep enabled** unless your setup uses them.

inputs.name: Clear overridden synced regex patterns
inputs.description: Regex overrides are not used by this template. **Keep enabled** unless you use them to disable specific regexes.

inputs.name: Clear ranked regex patterns
inputs.description: Ranked regex come from synced URLs. **Keep enabled** unless you are also using your own.

inputs.name: Clear ranked stream expressions
inputs.description: Ranked stream expressions come from synced URLs. **Keep enabled** unless you are also using your own.

inputs.name: Clear overridden synced stream expressions
inputs.description: Enable to reset to base synced scores (removes per-expression score edits).

english.expression: /*#𝚅𝚒𝚍𝚑𝚒𝚗'𝚜 𝚁𝚎𝚐𝚎𝚡𝚎𝚜 — 𝙴𝚗𝚐𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚑 𝚁𝚊𝚗𝚔𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚝𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚖 𝙴𝚡𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜 (𝚜𝚢𝚗𝚌𝚎𝚍). 𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚊𝚐 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚖𝚜, 𝚟𝚒𝚜𝚒𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚒𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚖𝚊𝚝𝚝𝚎𝚛.*/ []
